name: fs.read
description: read bounded text or supported media from files with pagination, MIME metadata, binary detection, and structured truncation for agent-safe file ingestion
underlying: workspace fs read, or task:fs read when a branch is resolved

name: fs.search
description: search file contents with ripgrep and return structured bounded matches for agent-safe discovery
underlying: workspace fs search, or task:fs search when a branch is resolved

name: fs.list
description: list or find files in the repo root or a resolved task worktree
underlying: workspace fs list, or task:fs list when a branch is resolved

name: fs.write
description: write a file in a task worktree

name: fs.apply_patch
description: apply an anchored patch file with embedded task-worktree-relative paths

name: http
description: make HTTP requests through the workspace http wrapper (wraps xh)

name: fs.trash
description: move a task worktree file to trash

name: task.start
description: create a task branch, worktree, and draft PR

name: task.init
description: write task metadata for an existing worktree

name: task.push
description: push changed task files to the task branch through GitHub API

name: task.pr
description: merge task to stream and create or refresh the stream review PR

name: task.prs
description: show task and review PR links

name: task.merge
description: merge a pull request through the workspace task merge script

name: task.finish
description: finish a task branch after merge

name: task.cleanup
description: preview or remove stale task worktrees and branches

name: task.current
description: resolve the current task branch without running a mutating command

name: task.ensureSynced
description: check whether the task stream appears synced

name: worker.call
description: delegate a bounded instruction file to a configured local worker provider

name: taskMeta.smoke
description: run the task metadata smoke suite

name: context.search
description: search project memory by content

name: context.find
description: search project memory by title

name: context.get
description: read a full project memory search result

name: context.list
description: list recent project memories

name: context.save
description: save a file or text into project memory

name: context.categories
description: list project memory categories

name: context.trace
description: query local workspace tool traces from the repo-scoped SQLite trace store

name: explore
description: run repository exploration retrieval

name: decideNext
description: recommend the next action from evidence state

name: confidenceScore
description: score confidence from evidence state

name: exploit
description: select the highest-confidence editing target

name: confirm
description: run verification or targeted validation through confirm

name: audit
description: audit workspace scripts, docs, or index freshness

name: stream.context
description: show recent stream context

name: stream.list
description: list stream branches

name: stream.sync
description: sync a stream branch with main

name: review.run
description: run the workspace review checks

name: verify
description: run the full task safety gate

name: prReview
description: fetch review comments for a PR

name: aiReview
description: run the AI PR review helper

name: gh
description: run the workspace GitHub helper with an explicit action

name: github
description: typed GitHub facade with semantic operations and presets; prefer over raw gh

name: git.diff
description: inspect task or working-tree diffs as bounded structured JSON for agents

name: browser
description: run the generic workspace browser wrapper command

name: browser.open
description: open a URL with the browser wrapper

name: browser.test
description: open a URL, wait for load, snapshot, and screenshot

name: browser.consuelo
description: open consuelo.consuelohq.com with the browser wrapper

name: browser.app
description: open app.consuelohq.com with the browser wrapper

name: browser.screenshot
description: capture a browser screenshot

name: browser.snap
description: capture an accessibility snapshot

name: browser.click
description: click a browser element by ref

name: browser.fill
description: fill a browser input by ref

name: browser.login
description: run a saved browser auth login profile

name: browser.reauth
description: restart the browser daemon and run a saved auth login profile

name: browser.eval
description: execute JavaScript on the current browser page

name: browser.raw
description: pass raw arguments through to agent-browser

name: browser.close
description: close active browser sessions

name: browser.get
description: get text, html, value, attributes, title, or URL from the current page

name: browser.find
description: find an element by role, text, label, placeholder, alt text, title, or test id and run an action

name: browser.wait
description: wait for a selector, duration, text, URL, load state, JavaScript condition, or download

name: browser.download
description: click an element and save the triggered download to a path

name: browser.tabs
description: list, create, select, or close browser tabs with stable labels when needed

name: browser.cookies
description: list, set, or clear browser cookies for the current browser session

name: browser.network
description: inspect or manage browser network requests, routes, and HAR capture

name: browser.dialog
description: accept or dismiss browser dialogs

name: browser.trace
description: start or stop browser tracing and optionally write a trace file

name: browser.clipboard
description: read from or write to the browser clipboard

name: sentry.config
description: show Sentry API configuration status from Keychain without exposing secrets

name: sentry.projects
description: list Sentry projects for the configured organization

name: sentry.issues
description: search Sentry issues across the configured organization

name: sentry.issue
description: retrieve one Sentry issue by short id or numeric issue id

name: sentry.issueEvent
description: retrieve a latest, recommended, oldest, or concrete Sentry event for an issue

name: sentry.event
description: retrieve or resolve a Sentry event id, using a project slug when available

name: sentry.trace
description: perform a best-effort Sentry trace lookup across organization events and issues

name: linear.search
description: search Linear issues with DEV default team support

name: linear.issue
description: read a Linear issue by identifier or id

name: linear.createIssue
description: create a Linear issue with DEV/open defaults and the opensaas label

name: linear.updateIssue
description: update Linear issue fields including labels, project, cycle, and parent

name: linear.labels
description: list Linear issue labels for label consistency

name: linear.teams
description: list Linear teams and workflow states

name: linear.projects
description: list Linear projects and ids

name: linear.states
description: list workflow states for a Linear team

name: wait
description: sleep, create detached wait checkpoints, or wait for a PR/deploy

name: tmp
description: run the workspace temp-file helper

name: research.ingest
description: generate a local research packet and autosave its text bundle to context

exampleInput.question: What should I learn from this?

name: railway.logs
description: read Railway deploy/runtime logs through the workspace script

name: railway.redeploy
description: trigger a Railway redeploy

name: website.deploy
description: deploy the Consuelo website

name: doctor
description: run workspace diagnostics

name: status
description: show compact workspace status

name: git.status
description: alias for status; use status directly in new code

name: server
description: manage the workspace MCP server reload/status lifecycle

name: checkFiles
description: run syntax checks over a set of files through code.call in the task worktree

name: editFlow
description: run a search-read-patch-verify flow as a composed script

name: mac.call
description: emergency host escape hatch for non-repo Mac commands or recovery when task worktree routing is broken. Do not use `mac.call` for repo-scoped tests, package scripts, builds, typechecks, syntax checks, or validation; use code.call with taskSession instead.

name: mac.exec
description: legacy alias for mac.call; emergency host escape hatch only. Do not use `mac.call` for repo-scoped tests, package scripts, builds, typechecks, syntax checks, or validation; use code.call with taskSession instead.

name: mac.read
description: read a non-repo file on the Mac

name: mac.write
description: write a non-repo file on the Mac

name: mac.search
description: search non-repo files on the Mac

name: mac.list
description: list non-repo files on the Mac

name: mac.process
description: list or kill local Mac processes

name: mac.port
description: check or find a local port

name: code.run
description: run a small JavaScript program over workspace APIs for control flow, filtering, summarization, and output reduction

name: code.call
description: preferred repo-scoped execution tool for focused tests, package scripts, typechecks, syntax checks, and short Python, Bun, or Bash programs inside the Consuelo OS runtime; use this instead of mac.call when a taskSession/task worktree exists

name: tools.search
description: search workspace tools by intent and return ranked usage guidance

name: generate.docs
description: generate TOOLS.md from the tool manifest

name: generate.types
description: generate workspace.d.ts from the tool manifest

name: design.publish
description: publish a design artifact through private Tailscale Serve and update the design wiki archive

name: design.refresh
description: regenerate and publish the existing Consuelo Wiki archive without adding an artifact

name: office.run
description: start Open Design daemon and web UI in the foreground through the Bun facade

name: office.getDesignSystem
description: return base Consuelo DESIGN.md and office AGENTS.md only

name: office.listSkills
description: list upstream Open Design skills and Consuelo workflow mappings

name: office.listDesignSystems
description: list Consuelo default design system and upstream reference systems

name: office.upstreamStatus
description: show vendored Open Design metadata and runtime requirements

name: office.railwayCheck
description: verify office is excluded from Railway deploy paths

name: office.check
description: run office package boundary and Railway checks

name: office.generateWebsite
description: create a headless Open Design work order for a website artifact; pass live=true only for a headed UI session

name: office.generateDemo
description: create a headless Open Design work order for a demo artifact; pass live=true only for a headed UI session

name: office.generateImageBrief
description: create a headless Open Design work order for a image/media artifact; pass live=true only for a headed UI session

name: office.generateDigitalEguide
description: create a headless Open Design work order for a digital e-guide artifact, optionally using a named Consuelo e-guide template

name: office.generateEmail
description: create a headless Open Design work order for a email artifact; pass live=true only for a headed UI session

name: office.generateMotionFrame

name: office.renderHyperframes

name: office.uiBg
description: start Open Design managed runtimes in the background through the Bun facade

name: office.uiStop
description: stop Open Design managed runtimes through the Bun facade

name: office.uiStatus
description: show Open Design managed runtime status through the Bun facade

description: show Open Design managed runtime logs through the Bun facade

name: intent
description: start a workflow intent or dispatch a scoped workflow hook event and return the relevant manifest bundle
